notes: Chunk contains a single event: Q&A portion (part 2 of 2) of the 2023-05-10 earnings-call transcript; all candidates come from that one source_id.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (KPIs appear only on chunk_001).

Skipped as vague/non-causal (5): 'potentially slowing macro' (bare macro), 'pockets of customer weakness' (answered as comparison noise, no specific cause), generic 'unprecedented level of inflation' (covered by grocery_price_inflation and commodity_costs), daypart/shoulder-mix discussion (company stated no pattern, no causal claim), generic 'strong earnings and cash flow positions'.
Provider labels BlackBox/NAPTRAC and vendor DoorDash kept out of names per R7; concepts named as restaurant_industry_traffic and third_party_delivery.

restaurant_traffic, on_premise_traffic, urban_restaurant_traffic, and restaurant_industry_traffic kept separate per R9 granularity (company total vs on-premise channel vs urban locations vs industry benchmark).
